title: Glade Plug in Air Freshener Refill, Electric Scented Oil Room Air Freshener, Warm Apple Pie, Pack of 6 (6 x 20ml)
features: Light Up Moments That Matter with the Warm Apple Pie air freshener plugin refill from the Glade Holiday Glow Collection
This limited edition plugin refill brings festive warmth to every gathering with the scent of crisp apples and mixed winter berries blended with clove, cinnamon & nutmeg
Enjoy the long-lasting authentic fragrance infused with Essential Oils, for Up to 100 days* (*based on 12 hours use/day on low setting) with our air freshener plugin

description: Product Description Light Up Moments That Matter with the Warm Apple Pie plug-in air freshener refill for home use. This limited edition plug-in refill brings festive warmth to every gathering with the scent of crisp apples and mixed winter berries blended with clove, cinnamon & nutmeg. Enjoy Glade Electric scented oils fragrance infused with Essential Oils for Up to 100 days* (*based on 12 hours use/day on low setting). Elevate the energy with this Glade air freshener for any room, with a long-lasting authentic fragrance crafted by master perfumers. The Glade Holiday Glow Collection is a range of limited-time-only Glade scents that will surround you with holiday spirit and fragrances inspired by the joy of the season. Ingredients cinnamaldehyde eugenol coumarin 1-(2,6,6-trimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one Ingredients cinnamaldehyde eugenol coumarin 1-(2,6,6-trimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one
